title: All-in-One PDF Online Toolkit
summary: WPS PDF gathers editing, conversion, merging, splitting, compression, signing, and organizing tools in one free online toolkit. Move seamlessly between PDF, Word, Excel, PPT, and image formats without switching apps, then continue in WPS Office for deeper editing.

title: Edit PDFs Like Word
summary: WPS PDF lets you edit text, images, and forms directly inside a PDF using familiar Word-like tools—no forced conversion required. Add text, fill forms, apply e-signatures, highlight content, and collaborate through comments, all from pdf.wps.com or WPS Office.

title: Online Tools + Desktop Power
summary: Start free in the browser for quick PDF jobs, then download WPS Office for advanced desktop features like OCR, watermarks, e-signatures, and PDF-to-image conversion. One connected toolkit spans web convenience and full desktop-grade PDF power.

title: Smart PDF Compression
summary: WPS PDF shrinks large files with three compression methods—covering high quality, recommended balance, and smallest size—so users can choose the right trade-off between fidelity and file size before sharing, uploading, or archiving PDFs online for free.

title: Available on Every Platform
summary: WPS Office ships official builds for Windows, Mac (Intel and Apple silicon), Linux, Android, and iOS, plus browser-based online tools. Recognized as Google Play Best of 2015 and App Store Best of 2015, with 500M+ downloads worldwide across devices.

title: Now with 3D Format Conversion
summary: WPS PDF Tools now converts mesh, CAD, and BIM files—OBJ, STEP, IGES, IFC, Revit, and more—into standard outputs like STL, FBX, and GLB/GLTF. Engineers and designers can bridge CAD/BIM authoring formats with lightweight 3D formats in one workflow.
